author: Hello + Claude
description: Kicks members who haven't received a designated 'verified' role (e.g. Member) within a configurable number of days after joining.
install_msg: Thanks for installing AutoKick! Run `[p]autokick set role @Member` and `[p]autokick set days 3` to get started, then `[p]autokick set toggle true` to enable it.
short: Kick members who never get verified within N days of joining.
